overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \frac {f (\mathbf {x} | \boldsymbol {\theta})}{q (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta})} = \frac {g (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) h (\mathbf {x})}{q (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta})} \quad \text {(since (6.2.3) is satisfied)} \\ = \frac {g (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) h (\mathbf {x})}{\Sigma_ {A _ {T (\mathbf {x})}} g (T (\mathbf {y}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) h (\mathbf {y})} \quad \text {(definition of the pmf of T)} \\ = \frac {g (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) h (\mathbf {x})}{g (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) \Sigma_ {A _ {T (\mathbf {x})}} h (\mathbf {y})} \quad \text {(since T is constant on A_{T(\mathbf {x})})} \\ = \frac {h (\mathbf {x})}{\Sigma_ {A _ {T (\mathbf {x})}} h (\mathbf {y})}. \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \frac {f (\mathbf {x} | \boldsymbol {\theta})}{q (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta})} = \frac {g (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) h (\mathbf {x})}{q (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta})} \quad \text {(since (6.2.3) is satisfied)} \\ = \frac {g (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) h (\mathbf {x})}{\sum_{\mathbf {y} \in A _ {T (\mathbf {x})}} g (T (\mathbf {y}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) h (\mathbf {y})} \quad \text {(definition of the pmf of T)} \\ = \frac {g (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) h (\mathbf {x})}{g (T (\mathbf {x}) | \boldsymbol {\theta}) \sum_{\mathbf {y} \in A _ {T (\mathbf {x})}} h (\mathbf {y})} \quad \text {(since T is constant on $A _ {T (\mathbf {x})}$)} \\ = \frac {h (\mathbf {x})}{\sum_{\mathbf {y} \in A _ {T (\mathbf {x})}} h (\mathbf {y})}. \\ \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} f _ {X _ {(j)}} (x) = \frac {d}{d x} F _ {X _ {(j)}} (x) \\ = \sum_ {k = j} ^ {n} \binom {n} {k} \left(k \left[ F _ {X} (x) \right] ^ {k - 1} \left[ 1 - F _ {X} (x) \right] ^ {n - k} f _ {X} (x) \right. \\ \left. - (n - k) \left[ F _ {X} (x) \right] ^ {k} \left[ 1 - F _ {X} (x) \right] ^ {n - k - 1} f _ {X} (x)\right) \quad (\text { chain   rule }) \\ = \binom{n}{j} j f _ {X} (x) [ F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {j - 1} [ 1 - F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {n - j} \\ + \sum_ {k = j + 1} ^ {n} \binom {n} {k} k [ F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {k - 1} [ 1 - F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {n - k} f _ {X} (x) \\ - \sum_ {k = j} ^ {n - 1} \binom {n} {k} (n - k) [ F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {k} [ 1 - F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {n - k - 1} f _ {X} (x) \quad \binomk = n \text {term} \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} f _ {X _ {(j)}} (x) = \frac {d}{d x} F _ {X _ {(j)}} (x) \\ = \sum_ {k = j} ^ {n} \binom {n} {k} \left(k \left[ F _ {X} (x) \right] ^ {k - 1} \left[ 1 - F _ {X} (x) \right] ^ {n - k} f _ {X} (x) - (n - k) \left[ F _ {X} (x) \right] ^ {k} \left[ 1 - F _ {X} (x) \right] ^ {n - k - 1} f _ {X} (x)\right) \quad (\text { chain rule }) \\ = \binom{n}{j} j f _ {X} (x) [ F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {j - 1} [ 1 - F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {n - j} \\ + \sum_ {k = j + 1} ^ {n} \binom {n} {k} k [ F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {k - 1} [ 1 - F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {n - k} f _ {X} (x) \\ - \sum_ {k = j} ^ {n - 1} \binom {n} {k} (n - k) [ F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {k} [ 1 - F _ {X} (x) ] ^ {n - k - 1} f _ {X} (x) \quad \text {(k = n term)} \\ \end{array}
